## XBus.on() method

Retrieves the observable for an event.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
on<Event extends XEvent>(event: Event, withMetadata?: false): Observable<XEventPayload<Event>>;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  event | Event | The event to retrieve an observable for. |
|  withMetadata | false | When set to <code>false</code>, the observable payload will be the Event payload. |

<b>Returns:</b>

Observable&lt;[XEventPayload](./x-components.xeventpayload.md)<!-- -->&lt;Event&gt;&gt;

An Observable of the event payload.
